metadata.name: sss_core
metadata.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard core issuer program

instructions.name: accept_authority
docs: Step 2: Accept authority transfer (new authority must sign)

instructions.name: add_to_allowlist
docs: Add an address to the allowlist (SSS-3, authority only)

instructions.name: add_to_blacklist
docs: Add an address to the blacklist (SSS-2 only)

instructions.name: freeze_account
docs: Freeze a token account (requires freezer role)

instructions.name: grant_role
docs: Grant a role to an address

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize a new stablecoin with Token-2022 extensions

accounts.name: mint
docs: The mint account — must be a fresh signer keypair from the client

instructions.name: mint_tokens
docs: Mint tokens (requires minter role + quota check)

instructions.name: propose_authority
docs: Step 1: Propose a new authority (two-step transfer for safety)

instructions.name: remove_from_allowlist
docs: Remove an address from the allowlist (SSS-3, authority only)

instructions.name: remove_from_blacklist
docs: Remove an address from the blacklist (SSS-2 only)

instructions.name: revoke_role
docs: Revoke a role from an address

instructions.name: seize
docs: Atomic seize: thaw -> burn -> refreeze -> mint to treasury (SSS-2 only)

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: Blacklist entry proves the target is blacklisted (must be active)

accounts.name: source_token_account
docs: Source token account (owned by blacklisted address, typically frozen)

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Destination token account (treasury, receives newly minted tokens)

instructions.name: set_quota
docs: Set minting quota for a minter

accounts.name: minter_role
docs: Verify minter has the minter role and it's active

instructions.name: set_supply_cap
docs: Set the supply cap (0 = unlimited, authority only)

instructions.name: thaw_account
docs: Thaw a frozen token account (requires freezer role)

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: Single-step authority transfer (immediate, no acceptance needed)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller does not have the required role

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ComplianceNotEnabled
errors.msg: Compliance features are not enabled for this stablecoin

errors.name: SeizeNonBlacklisted
errors.msg: Cannot seize from a non-blacklisted address

errors.name: NoPendingAuthority
errors.msg: No pending authority transfer to accept or cancel

errors.name: SupplyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Minting would exceed the supply cap

errors.name: AllowlistNotEnabled
errors.msg: Allowlist mode is not enabled for this stablecoin

errors.name: NotAllowlisted
errors.msg: Address is not on the allowlist

errors.name: OraclePriceDepegged
errors.msg: Oracle price indicates depeg beyond tolerance

types.name: AllowlistEntry
docs: Unlike blacklist entries, allowlist entries are closed on removal.

fields.name: config
docs: The config this allowlist entry is associated with

fields.name: added_at
docs: When the address was added (unix timestamp)

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: Entries are deactivated (active=false) rather than deleted for audit trail.

fields.name: config
docs: The config this blacklist entry is associated with

fields.name: blacklisted_at
docs: When the address was blacklisted (unix timestamp)

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this blacklist entry is currently active

fields.name: config
docs: The config this quota is associated with

fields.name: minter
docs: The minter this quota applies to

fields.name: quota_limit
docs: Maximum amount this minter can mint (u64::MAX = unlimited)

fields.name: minted_amount
docs: Amount already minted by this minter

fields.name: config
docs: The config this oracle is associated with

fields.name: max_deviation_bps
docs: Maximum allowed deviation from $1.00 in basis points (e.g. 100 = 1%)

fields.name: max_staleness_secs
docs: Maximum staleness in seconds before price is considered stale

fields.name: config
docs: The config this role is associated with

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this role is currently active

fields.name: granted_at
docs: When this role was granted (unix timestamp)

types.name: StablecoinConfig
docs: Core configuration account for a stablecoin mint.

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority who can manage roles and admin operations

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority for two-step transfer (zero = none pending)

fields.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint this config governs

fields.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Transfer hook program ID (zero if SSS-1)

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether the stablecoin is paused (no minting/burning/transfers)

fields.name: compliance_enabled
docs: Whether SSS-2 compliance features are enabled

fields.name: enable_allowlist
docs: Whether SSS-3 allowlist mode is enabled

types.name: StablecoinConfigInput
docs: Input parameters for initializing a stablecoin

fields.name: compliance_enabled
docs: Enable SSS-2 compliance features (permanent delegate, transfer hook, default frozen)
